resume.raw_text:
=== Ayele Rose Bethel Dounou - Resume.pdf ===
AYELE ROSE BETHEL DOUNOU 

Bronx, NY 10456 
347-849-8594 | Rosedounou@gmail.com 

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY 

Motivated and customer-focused professional with experience in hospitality, guest services, 
customer service, and event support. Skilled in communication, teamwork, leadership, and 
problem-solving in fast-paced environments. Passionate about serving others, supporting 
community initiatives, and creating positive experiences for guests and clients. 

EDUCATION 

International Community High School — Bronx, NY 
High School Diploma, 2024 

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE 

Catering & Events Assistant 

Havana Central | New York, NY 
February 2026 – Present 

●  Assisted with event setup, service, and cleanup. 
●  Provided excellent customer service to guests. 
●  Coordinated with kitchen and event staff to ensure smooth event operations. 
●  Maintained cleanliness and adhered to food safety standards. 
●  Restocked supplies and monitored food stations during events. 

Host 

Havana Central | New York, NY 
September 2025 – Present 

●  Greet guests and create a welcoming dining experience. 
●  Manage reservations and waitlists efficiently. 
●  Seat guests and coordinate table assignments. 
●  Communicate with servers and management to maintain smooth service. 
●  Address guest questions and concerns professionally. 

 Usher / Guest Services 

Madison Square Garden Entertainment Corp. | New York, NY 
September 2024 – October 2025 

●  Managed guest flow during events and performances. 
●  Delivered exceptional customer service to patrons. 
●  Maintained a safe and secure environment. 
●  Utilized ticketing and point-of-sale systems. 
●  Collaborated with team members to resolve guest concerns. 
●  Maintained clean and organized guest areas. 

Crew Member / Cashier 

Dunkin' | New York, NY 
May 2023 – January 2025 

●  Processed customer orders accurately and efficiently. 
●  Prepared food and beverage items according to company standards. 
●  Handled cash and electronic transactions. 
●  Maintained cleanliness in dining and kitchen areas. 
●  Delivered excellent customer service in a fast-paced environment. 

Cashier / Customer Service Representative 

Rose Boutique | Conakry, Guinea 
October 2018 – June 2021 

●  Assisted customers and provided high-quality service. 
●  Resolved customer concerns and inquiries. 
●  Processed sales transactions and managed cash handling. 
●  Assisted with inventory management and stock organization. 

VOLUNTEER EXPERIENCE 

Youth Ministry Leader 

Saint Anthony of Padua Parish | Bronx, NY 
September 2025 – Present 

●  Lead and mentor middle and high school students through faith-based programs. 
●  Plan activities, retreats, service projects, and community outreach initiatives. 
●  Provide guidance and support to encourage personal and spiritual growth. 
●  Collaborate with parish leaders, volunteers, and parents. 

 Volunteer 

Frères Unis | Bronx, NY 
September 2022 – Present 

●  Assist with fundraising efforts and donation drives. 
●  Support educational and healthcare initiatives in Guinea. 
●  Coordinate collection and distribution of supplies for families in need. 

Translator 

International Community High School | Bronx, NY 
January 2022 – June 2022 

●  Assisted students and families by translating between teachers and students. 
●  Supported communication to help students meet academic goals. 

Intern 

SpeakHire | Bronx, NY 
July 2022 – May 2024 

●  Participated in leadership development and career readiness programs. 
●  Received professional coaching on resumes, interviews, and workplace skills. 
●  Completed individual projects focused on professional growth. 

SKILLS 

●  Customer Service 
●  Hospitality & Guest Relations 
●  Event Support & Catering 
●  Leadership & Teamwork 
●  Communication 
●  Time Management 
●  Problem Solving 
●  Microsoft Office 
●  Google Workspace 

Languages: English, French, Fulani, Sosso, Mandingo, Ewe 

ACHIEVEMENTS 

●  Salutatorian, Class of 2024 
●  Student Government President 

 ●  School Ambassador 
●  Perfect Attendance Award (2021–2022) 
●  Published family recipe in Food Memories: A Collection of Recipes from the Heart
